narrative_scene_description: To the left of a yellow wall covered in addiction treatment posters is a parked white pickup truck [entity_001]. Adjacent to the truck is a two-story yellow building [entity_002] with arched windows and brown shutters. Beside this building stands the SHAMBAZAR SCHOOL [entity_004], where a man on a red bicycle [entity_003] crosses a zebra crossing. To the right of the school intersection is a large blue transit bus marked SINTHIMORE 30A ESPLANADE [entity_005]. Adjacent to the bus route is a pink multi-story building featuring DATTA GLASS. To the right of DATTA GLASS is AVENUE CAFE [entity_007]. Beside AVENUE CAFE [entity_007] is the SUTANUTI DRY CLEANER [entity_008], with several vehicles parked along the adjacent narrow street. Next to the dry cleaner is a multi-story residential building [entity_012] with laundry hanging from the upper windows [entity_010] and a cyclist [entity_011] passing the blue and white railing. Beside this building is a street pole with an IAS UPSC sign near where another blue bus with a RAIPUR ELEC [entity_013] advertisement passes. To the right of the bus path is a red heritage building [entity_019] with a large arched entranceway. Adjacent to the red building is a large billboard for ANJALI JEWELLERS [entity_020]. Beside the billboard area are the COBALTIC DENTAL CLINIC [entity_025] and UCO BANK, where several green and yellow auto-rickshaws [entity_023] [entity_024] are positioned. To the right of the bank is a major intersection featuring a BHARAT PETROLEUM [entity_030] gas station and a busy street scene with tram tracks [entity_029]. Adjacent to the gas station is a decorative installation with a large red heart symbol [entity_032] and the text WARD 17 [entity_033]. To the right of the installation is SAI MEDICAL [entity_034] and SARILAB MEDICO CHEMIST & DRUGGISTS [entity_038]. Beside the medical shops is UP-TO-DATE [entity_039] [entity_041] dry cleaners. Adjacent to the dry cleaners is the INDIAN OVERSEAS BANK [entity_040]. To the right of the bank is a modern building housing NOVO D'NOVO CLINICS [entity_045] and ARIHAN AAWAS [entity_046]. Beside these structures is a final orange-painted building housing the SHANTILAL CHARITY Foundation Trust, located next to a large leafy tree [entity_047].
temporal_progression_description: At the beginning of the clip (0:00), the vehicle starts beside a yellow wall with posters and a parked white pickup truck [entity_001]. Shortly after (0:05), it passes the intersection at SHAMBAZAR SCHOOL [entity_004] where a cyclist [entity_003] is crossing. As the vehicle continues forward (0:10), a large blue bus with text SINTHIMORE 30A ESPLANADE [entity_005] passes by. Further along the road (0:15), the vehicle passes AVENUE CAFE [entity_007] and SUTANUTI DRY CLEANER [entity_008] on the right. Near the 0:25 mark, a second blue bus featuring a RAIPUR ELEC [entity_013] sign comes into view. As the drive continues (0:35), the vehicle passes a red heritage building [entity_019] and a large billboard for ANJALI JEWELLERS [entity_020]. Around 0:45, the vehicle enters a major junction dominated by a BHARAT PETROLEUM [entity_030] gas station and an installation for WARD 17 [entity_033]. Toward the end of the clip (0:50-1:00), the vehicle passes the INDIAN OVERSEAS BANK [entity_040], NOVO D'NOVO CLINICS [entity_045], and finally reaches the SHANTILAL CHARITY building near a large tree [entity_047].
